violations.text: Shellstock tags are not maintained for 90 days. Shellstock tags or labels are required to be maintained for 90 calendar days from the date the container is emptied. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables, prepared foods) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
Bolognese was observed with a date mark exceeding 7 days. PIC disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC took unit out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
Hose located in the 3 bay sink area was observed being held together with tape and not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2024

Prep sink is lacking a proper air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
Observed 3 bay sink to be leaking from the bottom left pipe. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
Observed missing ceiling tile in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

The walls in the ware washing area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the mop sink and prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
